    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Import Required Libraries\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "\n",
        "file_id = \"191d8npDB8JTTJGswB2KKcK2mGJwHOfN2\"\n",

        "\n",
        "df = pd.read_csv(url, low_memory=False)\n",
        "print(df.head())"
      ],

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "\n",
        "# Top 10 states by number of candidates\n",
        "top_states = df['State_Name'].value_counts().head(10)\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10,5))\n",
        "top_states.plot(kind='bar')\n",
        "plt.title(\"Top 10 States by Candidate Records\")\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"State\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Count\")\n",
        "plt.xticks(rotation=45)\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 156
        },

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Gender Distribution Analysis (Pie Chart)\n",
        "\n",
        "gender_counts = df['Sex'].dropna().value_counts()\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(7,7))\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.pie(\n",
        "    gender_counts.values,\n",
        "    labels=gender_counts.index,\n",
        "    autopct='%1.1f%%'\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.title(\"Gender Distribution of Candidates\")\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],

        "#Conclusion\n",
        "print(\"\"\"\n",
        "Key Insights:\n",
        "1. Dataset contains election candidate records from multiple states.\n",
        "2. Candidate distribution varies across states.\n",
        "3. Education qualifications differ significantly.\n",
        "4. Multiple professional backgrounds are represented.\n",
        "5. Gender distribution can be analyzed using election data.\n",
        "\"\"\")"

            "1. Dataset contains election candidate records from multiple states.\n",
